title: Inheritance PASS: [106] QA_PLAN_CONTROL_COMPILER_CERT.v1 → [110] QA_SEISMIC_CONTROL_CERT.v1
_fixture_purpose: Certifies the second domain_instance edge from the control-compiler kernel. [106] QA_PLAN_CONTROL_COMPILER_CERT.v1 (family_extension) governs [110] QA_SEISMIC_CONTROL_CERT.v1 (domain_instance). Together with inherit_pass_106_to_105.json ([106]→[105] cymatics), this pair proves that QA_PLAN_CONTROL_COMPILER_CERT.v1 is genuinely cross-domain: the same kernel-governed compilation law governs pattern transitions in both Faraday instability (cymatics) and elastic wave propagation (seismology), despite completely different physics. IC5-IC7 are conditionally skipped because domain_instance certs have their own physical fail algebras, logging, and invariants that are not required to mirror the compiler parent.
